name: financy-desktop
description: App Electron que executa o frontend e o backend do Financy

scripts.build:ui: (cd ../frontend && npm run build) && cd ../desktop && node scripts/copy-ui.js
scripts.dist: npm run build:icon && npm run build:ui && npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.pack: npm run build:icon && npm run build:ui && npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.release: npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.release:dir: npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --dir

author: Daniel Garcia <daniel.of@gmail.com>
